appDescription.message: Verify AI-generated content against real sources. EU AI Act compliant.

invalidKeyFormat.message: Invalid key format. Keys start with klar_

selectMinChars.message: Select at least $MIN$ characters on the page first

selectHint.message: Select text on any page and right-click →

noInternetDesc.message: Check your network and try again.

requestTimeoutDesc.message: The server took too long. Try with shorter text.

rateLimitDesc.message: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.

apiKeyIssueDesc.message: Open the extension popup to configure your API key.

textTooShortDesc.message: Select at least $MIN$ characters to verify.

serverErrorDesc.message: KLAR is having issues. Try again shortly.

noApiKeyError.message: No API key configured. Open the extension popup to set up.

textTooShortError.message: Text too short. Select at least $MIN$ characters.

invalidApiKey.message: Invalid API key. Check and try again.

missingScope.message: Key missing 'verify' scope. Generate a new one.

cannotReachServer.message: Cannot reach server. Is it running?

setupDesc.message: Enter your API key to start verifying content.

selectTextHintFull.message: Select text on a page, then pick an action below

fullAnalysisDesc.message: Fact-check + bias + AI + plagiarism in one pass

cannotAnalyzePage.message: Cannot analyze on this page — try a regular website

cannotCapturePage.message: Cannot capture this page — try a regular website

trustScoreDesc.message: Ratio of supported vs. contradicted claims. Unconfirmed claims are excluded from this score.

verdictCouldNotVerifyBody.message: We checked $COUNT$ claims but couldn't find sources to confirm or deny any of them. This is common for very recent news, niche topics, or highly specific product details.

verdictAllVerified.message: All $COUNT$ claims checked out against independent sources. This content appears factually accurate.

verdictMostVerified.message: $SUP$ of $TOTAL$ claims are backed by sources. $UNV$ couldn't be checked but nothing was contradicted.

verdictAllContradicted.message: $COUNT$ directly contradicted by sources. None of the verifiable claims checked out. Do not rely on this content without independent verification.

verdictMixedBody.message: We verified $TOTAL$ claims. $SUP$ checked out, but some were contradicted by sources. Double-check the red-flagged claims before trusting this.

biasAnalysisDesc.message: Measures how balanced the language is. 0 = neutral, 100 = heavily biased. Checks for emotional language, loaded words, and one-sided framing.

aiDetectionResultDesc.message: Estimates the likelihood this text was AI-generated using statistical patterns. This is a heuristic — not a definitive proof. Edited AI text may score lower.

plagiarismCheckDesc.message: Checks text fragments against known sources. Higher originality % means less overlap found with existing published content.

noResults.message: No analysis results returned. Try selecting more text.

errApiKeyRequiredDesc.message: Open the KLAR popup and enter your API key.

errNoClaimsDesc.message: The selected text doesn't contain checkable facts.

errNoClaimsHint.message: Try selecting text with specific facts, statistics, dates, or names.

errTimeoutDesc.message: The analysis took too long to complete.

errTimeoutHint.message: Try selecting shorter text or using a single analysis mode instead of comprehensive.

errConnectionDesc.message: Could not reach the KLAR server.

errConnectionHint.message: Check your internet connection and try again.

errAnalysisDesc.message: Could not extract claims from this text.

errAnalysisHint.message: The AI model may be temporarily overloaded. Try again, or select different text.

errRateLimitDesc.message: Too many requests. Wait a moment and retry.

errCannotReadPageDesc.message: The server couldn't fetch or parse this URL.

errCannotReadPageHint.message: Try using 'Selection' or 'Full Page' capture mode instead of URL mode.

errContentBlockedDesc.message: Text flagged as potential prompt injection.

errContentBlockedHint.message: Try selecting a smaller, cleaner portion of text.

errQuotaDesc.message: Too many requests — the AI service is temporarily busy.

errServerHint.message: This is usually temporary. Try again in a few seconds.

noFactualClaims.message: No factual claims found in this text.

retryFailed.message: Could not retry — try selecting text and using the popup.

selectRetryText.message: Select text on a page or navigate to a website to retry.
